title: Sample Lesson Plan: Introduction to Critical Thinking

content.objective: Students will be able to identify logical fallacies in everyday arguments.

activities.description: Introduction: Define critical thinking and explain its importance (10 minutes)
Direct instruction: Present common logical fallacies with examples (15 minutes)
Guided practice: Analyze sample arguments as a class (15 minutes)
Independent practice: Students identify fallacies in provided texts (15 minutes)
Assessment: Exit ticket asking students to create their own example (5 minutes)

content.assessment: Students complete exit ticket demonstrating understanding of at least two logical fallacies.
